creator: andrew@grillet.co.uk
text:
Doing install from Boot-only CD:

Network configuration screen - I have 
ral0
sk0
prlip0

I have configured the ral0, and dont wish to configure the others. I am
offered the choices <OK> <Cancel>. OK reconfigures the ral0. Cancel
cancels the install. There is no other option <continue> would be a
useful choice. 

THIS IS FATAL TO THE INSTALL PROCESS (as in: Had to use Lubuntu instead :-{)

Fix: 

An option to <continue> would be a useful choice. (Its possible some other
procedure is required, in which case this should be explained on screen!)
How-To-Repeat: Try to install FBSD9.2 from the boot-only CD via wifi.
